calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

John C. Brown, Esq. appeared for plaintiff J2 Global Communications, Inc.
No appearance by defendants Joseph D. Hanna or Louis Quiles.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Sunstar Travel & Tours, Inc., dba SS Travel and Tours, dba S-Star Travel and Tour, was filed on January 26, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 29, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on March 13, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of J2 Global Communications, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendants Joseph D. Hanna and Louis Quiles as follows:

As to Defendant Joseph D. Hanna:

Damages/Principal - $354,000.00.
Costs - $2,126.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $356,126.50.

As to Defendant Louis Quiles:

Damages'Principal - $123,000.00
Costs - $2,126.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $125,126.50

Furthermore, defendants Joseph D. Hanna and Louis Quiles are enjoined and restrained from engaging in, committing, or performing, directly or indirectly, by any means whatsoever, any of the acts set for in paragraphs 3a & 3b of the judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
